# Search Suggestions For Batch E Agent Prompts

## GTK

```text
Base branch for Search Suggestions For Batch E:

- branch: search-suggestions-for-batch-e-core

Scope:
- searchSuggestions(_:for:)

Read first:
- docs/plans/search-suggestions-for-batch-e-plan.md
- docs/plans/search-suggestions-for-batch-e-worker-briefs.md

Your job:
- verify whether GTK needs any backend change
- if existing suggestion UI already works with core-filtered rows, report a no-op verification handoff
- only edit GTK files/tests if a real backend issue appears
```
